Package io.minio

Class ObjectReadArgs

java.lang.Object
io.minio.BaseArgs
io.minio.BucketArgs
io.minio.ObjectArgs
io.minio.ObjectVersionArgs
io.minio.ObjectReadArgs
Direct Known Subclasses:
DownloadObjectArgs, GetObjectAttributesArgs, ObjectConditionalReadArgs, SelectObjectContentArgs
public abstract class ObjectReadArgs extends ObjectVersionArgs
Common arguments of DownloadObjectArgs, GetObjectAttributesArgs, ObjectConditionalReadArgs and SelectObjectContentArgs.
